pages.text: $(bold)The Nanosuit Helmet$() is the command center of your nanotech integration. Fused with your body through integration with NanoCreatures, it provides critical protection and processing capability for your enhanced form.$(br2)$(bold)Protection Level:$() Equivalent to Netherite
The helmet serves as the primary processing unit for your nanosuit's integrated systems.

$(bold)Features:$()$(br)- $(bold)Enhanced Vision:$() See in darkness as if it were day$(br)- $(bold)Threat Detection:$() Highlighted hostile creatures through walls$(br)- $(bold)Nanobot Coordination:$() Manages all suit functions and abilities

$(bold)Energy Requirements:$()$(br)The helmet's systems drain Life Essence over time during use. The drain accelerates when active abilities are engaged.$(br2)Always maintain a supply of $(l:u_heroes:life_essence)Life Essence$(/l) to keep your suit operational.

The helmet is the anchor point of your nanosuit integration. It cannot be removed — it is fused with your very being. Your nanosuit integration and the helmet are one and the same.$(br2)$(italic)You are the weapon. The armor is only the shell.$()
